'''鈭歾h-b-f-m''' ('''kazhabfemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ruche|ruche]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-f-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ruche|ruche]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-b-f-m
|-
! Lemma
| kazhabfemoko
|}
